title: Claude AI Sells Broadcom (AVGO) Stock
excerpt: Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) is one of the stocks Claude AI recently pulled the plug on. Claude’s total return was about 20% since its first purchase in March. The...
content_html:
Fahad Saleem

Mon, July 20, 2026 at 3:42 PM PDT 4 min read

Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) is one of the stocks Claude AI recently pulled the plug on. Claude's total return was about 20% since its first purchase in March. The AI agent said it sold the stock because the math no longer worked. Its 12-month expected return on Broadcom had dropped to 5.9%, the 1-month outlook had turned negative, and there was no meaningful catalyst on the calendar before the September 3 earnings report. Claude said that meant holding a high-market-sensitivity semiconductor stock through the July Federal Reserve meeting for two months with nothing scheduled to trigger a re-evaluation. The sale leaves Claude's portfolio with no direct semiconductor exposure, a move the AI called deliberate.

Note: The stock selection for this article was based on "The Claude Portfolio" account on X, which is associated with Autopilot. The account claims Claude AI has full control of the portfolio, with AI sub-agents triggered when new information or catalysts require updated data. Claude AI, according to the account, operates a real-money portfolio through Autopilot and is responsible for investment decisions.

Why Bulls See This Differently

Many analysts read the same numbers and land on a long-term hold. In fiscal Q2 2026, Broadcom generated $10.26 billion in free cash flow, revenue rose 48% year-over-year to $22.2 billion, and AI semiconductor revenue jumped 143% to $10.8 billion. Management raised full-year AI semiconductor guidance to $56 billion and reaffirmed AI revenue above $100 billion for fiscal 2027. For Q3, the company guided to $29.4 billion in total revenue (up 84% year-over-year), including $16 billion in AI semiconductor revenue, growth of more than 200%.

The bull case isn't really about chip sales, though. Broadcom disclosed $164.6 billion in remaining performance obligations last quarter. Apple extended its custom silicon and connectivity partnership through 2031 in a deal exceeding $30 billion, covering more than 15 billion US-made chips. Meta's rollout runs past 1 gigawatt through 2029. OpenAI's arrangement is arguably the more revealing one: rather than buying standardized Nvidia GPUs, OpenAI is designing its own AI accelerator, Jalapeño, with Broadcom handling implementation, networking, and production — deployment starts in the second half of 2026 and runs through 2029. Bulls argue this positions Broadcom as something structurally different from Nvidia: not a chip vendor competing on price, but a custom-silicon partner that gets embedded in a customer's architecture years before deployment, which raises switching costs substantially once the system is built around it.

sentences.en: Apple extended its custom silicon and connectivity partnership through 2031 in a deal exceeding $30 billion, covering more than 15 billion US-made chips.
sentences.zh: 苹果将​​其定制芯片和连接合作伙伴关系延长至 2031 年，交易金额超过 300 亿美元，涵盖超过 150 亿颗美国制造的芯片。

sentences.en: Meta's rollout runs past 1 gigawatt through 2029.
sentences.zh: 到 2029 年，Meta 的部署量将超过 1 吉瓦。

sentences.en: OpenAI's arrangement is arguably the more revealing one: rather than buying standardized Nvidia GPUs, OpenAI is designing its own AI accelerator, Jalapeño, with Broadcom handling implementation, networking, and production — deployment starts in the second half of 2026 and runs through 2029.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 的安排可以说是更具启发性的：OpenAI 没有购买标准化的 Nvidia GPU，而是设计自己的 AI 加速器 Jalapeo，由 Broadcom 负责实施、网络和生产——部署将于 2026 年下半年开始，一直持续到 2029 年。

sentences.en: Bulls argue this positions Broadcom as something structurally different from Nvidia: not a chip vendor competing on price, but a custom-silicon partner that gets embedded in a customer's architecture years before deployment, which raises switching costs substantially once the system is built around it.
sentences.zh: 看涨者认为，这使得博通在结构上与英伟达不同：博通不是一家在价格上竞争的芯片供应商，而是一家定制芯片合作伙伴，在部署前几年就嵌入到客户的架构中，一旦围绕它构建系统，就会大大提高转换成本。

content_html_zh:
法赫德·萨利姆

太平洋夏令时间 2026 年 7 月 20 日星期一下午 3:42 阅读 4 分钟

Broadcom（纳斯达克股票代码：AVGO）是 Claude AI 最近终止的股票之一。 自 3 月份首次购买以来，Claude 的总回报率约为 20%。 人工智能代理商表示，它出售了股票，因为数学不再有效。 其对博通的 12 个月预期回报率已降至 5.9%，1 个月前景转为负面，并且在 9 月 3 日财报发布之前没有任何有意义的催化剂。 克劳德表示，这意味着在 7 月美联储会议之前持有一只市场敏感度较高的半导体股票两个月，没有任何计划触发重新评估。 这次出售使克劳德的投资组合不再有直接的半导体业务，人工智能称此举是故意的。

注：本文的选股基于 X 上的“The Claude Portfolio”账户，该账户与 Autopilot 相关。 该账户声称克劳德人工智能完全控制了投资组合，当新信息或催化剂需要更新数据时，人工智能子代理就会被触发。 据介绍，Claude AI 通过 Autopilot 运营真实货币投资组合，并负责投资决策。

为什么公牛对此有不同的看法

许多分析师看到了相同的数据并决定长期持有。 2026财年第二季度，博通产生了102.6亿美元的自由现金流，收入同比增长48%至222亿美元，AI半导体收入增长143%至108亿美元。 管理层将全年 AI 半导体指引提高至 560 亿美元，并重申 2027 财年 AI 收入超过 1000 亿美元。 第三季度，该公司预计总收入为294亿美元（同比增长84%），其中AI半导体收入为160亿美元，增长超过200%。

不过，牛市并不真正与芯片销售有关。 Broadcom 上季度披露了 1,646 亿美元的剩余履约义务。 苹果将​​其定制芯片和连接合作伙伴关系延长至 2031 年，交易金额超过 300 亿美元，涵盖超过 150 亿颗美国制造的芯片。 到 2029 年，Meta 的部署量将超过 1 吉瓦。 OpenAI 的安排可以说是更具启发性的：OpenAI 没有购买标准化的 Nvidia GPU，而是设计自己的 AI 加速器 Jalapeo，由 Broadcom 负责实施、网络和生产——部署将于 2026 年下半年开始，一直持续到 2029 年。 看涨者认为，这使得博通在结构上与英伟达不同：博通不是一家在价格上竞争的芯片供应商，而是一家定制芯片合作伙伴，在部署前几年就嵌入到客户的架构中，一旦围绕它构建系统，就会大大提高转换成本。
